description: Generated views closely match ground truth. Quiet road with buildings and parked vehicles. Lane markings, road structure, and white vehicle ahead are consistent.

Urban intersection. By f2, reference shows tunnel/underpass but generated still shows open street intersection. Major temporal/logical inconsistency — generated video fails to track ego-vehicle entering a tunnel. Pedestrians and vehicles also differ.
Commercial/parking area with parked vehicles. Generated and reference views well-aligned. Vehicle positions, building facades, and road markings consistent.

Road with trucks. Pedestrian in right-side reference views rendered differently in generated views. Truck positioning and scale show inconsistencies, suggesting object size/distance estimation errors.
Highway/expressway scene. Generated views highly consistent with reference. Clean trajectory lines and appropriate bounding boxes.
Suburban road with trees and low-rise buildings. Generated and reference match well. Road markings, curbs, vegetation, and parked vehicles consistent.
Night-time scene. Generated views extremely dark with no discernible features. Reference shows structures visible under illumination. Model fails to reproduce night scene faithfully.

Urban intersection in rainy conditions. Pedestrian in front-center reference view blurred/distorted in generated view. Traffic signal state ambiguous in generated views. Safety-critical semantic error.
Suburban intersection with parking structure. Generated and reference well-matched. Lane markings, building structures, and vehicle positions consistent.

Industrial area with trucks. Truck spatial arrangement differs from reference — generated view hallucinated or misplaced truck positions, making vehicles appear closer than in ground truth. Safety risk for distance estimation.
Urban intersection with buildings, crosswalk, and vehicles accurately reproduced. BEV bounding boxes align with visible objects.

Parked vehicles in ground truth along left side missing or reduced fidelity in generated views. BEV shows dense bounding boxes not all represented in generated camera views. Inconsistent building facades in f2.
Suburban/campus scene with modern buildings. Generated views match ground truth well. Pedestrian on left side present in both.

Urban scene under elevated structure. Left-side views exhibit texture/color distortion. White van in ground truth rendered with different shape in generated view. BEV trajectory shows lateral shift inconsistent with straight road.
Rainy industrial scene. Generated views show heavy haze/blurriness degrading object visibility vs. ground truth. Objects effectively lost in haze. Weather rendering inconsistency.
Urban scene with concrete wall and multi-story buildings. Generated views match ground truth reasonably well.
Urban road with pedestrians, buildings, and construction barriers. Key scene elements consistently reproduced.

Parking lot with many vehicles. Side views show differences in vehicle count and placement. Viewpoint change between f1 and f2 much larger in generated views than ground truth — temporal/motion inconsistency. Several vehicles absent or repositioned.
Urban bridge/highway scene. White car and construction crane match ground truth. BEV detections and lane lines consistent.
Scene passing under steel truss structure. Complex metallic framework and road geometry consistently reproduced.
Residential road with gentle curves. Generated views closely match ground truth. BEV shows reasonable trajectory.
Residential road with buildings and vegetation. Generated views visually consistent with reference.

Urban intersection. Generated front-left view shows different road surface and crosswalk markings from ground truth. Different buildings visible. Washed-out/overexposed lighting artifacts on left side.
Urban commercial area with billboard. Generated text partially garbled ('ESTON.COM' vs 'EAT N'). Scene brightness and color tone differ. Traffic cone in ground truth missing from generated view.
Busy urban parking area. Dense cluster of bounding boxes consistent with parked cars. Generated views closely match ground truth.
Urban intersection with traffic lights. Pedestrian crossing street in reference completely absent in generated views. Critical semantic-level safety issue. Scene structure also diverges.
Nighttime residential scene. Generated views match ground truth well given challenging low-light conditions. No hallucinated or missing objects.
Urban intersection on rainy/overcast day. Generated views match ground truth with consistent building facades and road markings.
Urban road with sedan ahead. Reference in f2 shows dramatically different weather condition (hazier/foggier). Pedestrian visible in reference absent in generated views. Environmental inconsistency.
Narrow urban street with RV/bus and USPS truck. Generated views closely match reference with consistent vehicle positions.
Elevated highway. In f2, generated views show parked vehicles and urban background not matching reference. Vehicles in ground truth rear views missing or incorrectly rendered.
Residential/urban street with parked cars. Generated views closely match ground truth. BEV bounding boxes align well.
Quiet suburban street with low traffic. Generated views match ground truth well.
Road with large orange/brown bus ahead. Generated views very consistent with ground truth. Bus, road markings, lane structure faithfully reproduced.
Intersection with degraded crosswalk markings. Pedestrian in ground truth f2 less clearly rendered in generated view. Smaller/distant vehicles underrepresented.
Parking lot with many vehicles. Generated views match ground truth reasonably well.
Large dark SUV/van appears noticeably closer in generated view than ground truth. Vehicle proximity mismatch could mislead distance estimation. Building facade texture differences in left-side views.

Large intersection with pedestrian. Generated views do not clearly render pedestrian visible in ground truth. Safety-critical semantic omission near intersection. Urban skyline/building layout shifted.
Nighttime driving. Generated and reference views consistently dark with matching road markings and distant lights.
Busy urban area with monument/statue and pedestrians. Generated views match ground truth well despite scene complexity.
Industrial/commercial area with trucks. Generated views closely match ground truth. Truck positions and road layout consistent.
Truck labeled 'NORTH EAST' with text/branding differing from ground truth. Parking lot vehicle position discrepancies in rear views.

Highway near shipping containers. Generated introduces hallucinated construction crane and glass building not in ground truth. Container surface textures show hallucinated signage. Environment changes too dramatically between frames.
Suburban residential scene. Generated and ground truth well-aligned.

Urban pedestrian crosswalk scene. Generated model misrepresents pedestrian positions and crosswalk interaction. Ego vehicle appears to proceed into active crosswalk. Ground truth shows construction barriers not captured.
Suburban scene with 'SLOW' road marking. Generated views match ground truth well.
Urban scene with tall buildings and wide road. Generated and ground truth well-matched.
Residential area with white buildings and green lawns. Generated views closely match ground truth.
Urban road with parking garage. Generated and reference well-matched.

Urban scene with white bus. Parked cars shifted/different in generated left-front view. Hallucinated van/truck in generated rear-left view not in ground truth. Bus appearance changes inconsistently between frames.
Urban scene with pedestrians, construction barriers, and buildings faithfully reproduced. No significant discrepancies.
Pedestrian in intersection less clearly defined in generated view. Building facade texture distortion and color shift in left-side views. Traffic light state ambiguous in generated views.

Generated rear/side views show significant scene divergence from ground truth with altered building geometry. Lane markings less distinct. Vehicle in right-side views missing — potential blind-spot safety issue.
Urban bridge/overpass scene. Generated and ground truth well-aligned. Pedestrian in rear views present in both.
Residential/suburban scene with parked cars. Generated views faithfully match ground truth. Temporal consistency maintained.
Cyclist in right-side views appears more prominent with different positioning in generated vs ground truth. Background blurring and texture inconsistency behind trees.
Park/residential area with large trees. Generated views closely match ground truth. Road markings well reproduced.
Industrial/commercial area on rainy day. Wet road surface, warehouses, and vehicles faithfully reproduced.

Vehicle appearance inconsistency between f1 and f2 in side views. Red/orange SUV color and shape altered in generated f2 compared to ground truth. Temporal inconsistency could confuse tracking algorithms.
Urban intersection with vehicles and pedestrians. White box truck consistently rendered. No significant safety issues.
Rainy urban scene. Generated views closely match reference. Road layout, buildings, and vegetation consistent.

Suburban intersection. Dark vehicle in generated front-left view altered in shape/position vs reference. Right-side views show blurry building textures and partially hallucinated vehicle. BEV bounding boxes without corresponding objects.
Daytime urban driving with clear lane markings. Generated views closely match reference. Silver car ahead consistently rendered.

Rainy intersection. Noticeable blurriness and color tone shift in generated front-center view in f2. Oversized BEV bounding boxes. Road surface reflections differ substantially — inconsistent wet-road rendering across time steps.

Urban scene with pedestrian crossing. Pedestrian shows inconsistent posture and scale between frames in generated vs reference. Truck appearance changes. Left-camera viewpoint discrepancy between generated and ground truth.
Urban scene with buildings and parked vehicles. Generated views match reference well. Construction barriers and curb details consistent.

Urban intersection with construction barriers. Construction zone elements differ in color saturation and shape. BEV shows exaggerated bounding regions. Possible temporal freeze/duplication artifact — f1 and f2 generated content appears identical.
Wide urban road with buildings. Generated views close match to reference. Lane markings and building facades consistent.

Residential road with pedestrian on left sidewalk. Pedestrian disappears from generated front-left camera in f2 while still visible in reference. Ego trajectory shows no deceleration. Critical safety risk — missing vulnerable road user.
Multi-lane road with bus and cars. Generated views show good fidelity. Vehicle counts and lane occupancy consistent.
NUS campus entrance. Generated views closely match reference. Road structure, signage, buildings, and vegetation consistent.

Urban intersection. Generated front-left and front-right views show different building structures and vehicle positions from ground truth. Pedestrian in crossing area shifted or missing. Lane markings differ.

Industrial/container yard. Generated views exhibit heavy blurriness and haze artifacts. Rear view scene layout diverges substantially from ground truth. Blurring obscures lane markings and nearby objects.
Nighttime urban intersection. Generated and reference well-matched. Street lighting, headlights, and road geometry consistent.

Rainy tree-lined road. Generated views show significant blurriness and fog artifacts vs clearer ground truth. Overexposed white region in f2 not in reference. Road surface and tree details heavily degraded.
Rainy residential street with pedestrians and parked vehicles. Generated views reasonably consistent with reference.
Nighttime urban intersection. Generated and reference match well. Road layout and lighting consistent.
Urban road near large white building with construction barriers. Generated views match reference. Lane markings correctly rendered.
Rainy urban road with parked vehicles and trees. Generated views consistent with ground truth.

Industrial/commercial area. Generated front-center view shows distorted building facade. Pedestrian visible in ground truth absent in generated view. BEV shows dense bounding boxes not accurately represented in generated camera views.
Urban scene with buildings and parked vehicles. Generated views closely match ground truth. BEV layout consistent.
Residential/park road. Last frame shows severe degradation and blurriness in reference vs generated. Significant temporal inconsistency. Lane markings less distinct.
Urban intersection with buses and vehicles. Generated views match ground truth well. Traffic cones correctly represented.
Urban street with pedestrians. Last frame shows heavily degraded/blurred reference imagery. Pedestrians rendered with different appearances/positions between generated and reference views.
Rural/suburban road with trees and oncoming truck. Generated and ground truth well-aligned.
Urban bridge/highway with city skyline. Generated views faithfully reproduce road structure and buildings.
Residential area. Silver/white vehicle appears in different position and scale in generated vs ground truth. Large red BEV region suggests anomaly. Road median/divider appearance differs.
Urban intersection with pedestrians and parked cars. Generated views consistent with ground truth. No hallucinated or missing objects.
Parking lot. Vehicles with altered positioning in generated vs ground truth. White SUV and dark car swap relative positions — vehicle identity/placement inconsistency.

Urban/industrial road. Generated front-center view shows fabricated building text '617 523 8000' not matching ground truth 'BRUSCHI C...'. Clear semantic hallucination of incorrect signage. Building appearances and road layout differ.
Nighttime scene. Generated views largely consistent with ground truth. Road markings and lane structure match.
Urban daytime scene. White car in generated view doesn't match ground truth vehicle appearance/position. Vehicle identities shift between generated and reference views.

Suburban scene with construction barriers. Vehicles in BEV shifted or disappeared between frames. Generated left-side views show different tree and building textures from ground truth. Scene drift in construction zone.
Residential/suburban scene. Generated views miss pedestrians/people near roadside visible in ground truth. Safety-relevant semantic error — missing vulnerable road users.
Nighttime urban scene with oncoming headlights. Generated and reference well-matched. Lane trajectory smooth.
Overcast industrial/commercial area. Generated views closely match ground truth. Good consistency between frames.

Nighttime parking area. Large bright white vehicle overexposed and distorted in generated view. Right-side views show empty dark scene while reference shows wet reflective pavement. Potentially aggressive maneuver near parked vehicles.
Nighttime residential street. Generated and reference views match well. Simple forward trajectory with no nearby objects.
Daytime urban scene with many vehicles and truck. Generated views closely match reference. Vehicle appearances well preserved.
Daytime urban street with parked cars, trees, and buildings. Generated views match ground truth well. No hallucinated or missing objects.
